overview.title: Design

overview.description: Websites, web apps, quizzes, calculators, CRM, dashboards and integrations.

overview.title: Analytics
overview.description: Parsing, APIs, ad audits, reports and dashboards.

overview.title: Marketing

overview.title: Other
overview.description: If your task does not fit the list, choose this option and describe it in the quiz.

offers.title: Free initial consultation
offers.description: We will review your task, suggest an approach and help you understand where to start.

offers.title: Express audit of your digital funnel
offers.description: We will check your website, ads, request form and user path before the first contact.

offers.title: Quiz for cost estimation
offers.description: We will help build a short quiz that segments clients and sends a request to your CRM.
